title: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice for the Tourism and Hospitality Sector
summary: Applies to hotels, travel agencies, and tour operators. Addresses the collection of passport data and guest preferences.

provisions.title: Collection of Identity Documents
provisions.content: Collection of NRIC or Passport copies must be limited to legal requirements (e.g. Police/Immigration) and stored securely.

provisions.title: Guest Preference Profiles
provisions.content: Processing of guest preferences for marketing must be based on valid consent with a clear opt-out mechanism.
